note: SPI<->CAN bridge: 'spi-can-if-linux bridge' exposes the bike's CAN fleet on SocketCAN vcan0 by bridging it over SPI to the imx8_bridge co-processor (/dev/spidev1.0). A composite channel couples a SocketCAN endpoint to a SPI-master endpoint; the CAN transport-protocol (TP) layer reassembles 8-byte CAN frames into multiframe transfers keyed by (src,idx,trgt) — the same lib/src/tp layer mqtt-ftp defers to. Reconstructed to behaviour-oriented C in main/spi_can_bridge/{src,include} (2 TUs, build clean): the SocketCAN endpoint is reconstructed faithfully (socket/ioctl/bind), the SPIM channel + composite + CAN-TP are modelled (vendor). Decoded by direct decompile (the workflow verify agents balked).

named_functions.0x001065f0: main  // config_lookup_by_name('bridge') (argv[1] overrides); GPIO data-ready init + set 0/1; signals {2,15,3}; 'Starting on %s, irq_pin=%d' main.cpp:0x62; init ladder: vmlib (else 0x65 'Could not initialize vmlib'), composite (0x6b), SocketCAN open vcan0 (0x73), SPIM channel init (0x7a), start composite (0x7f); run + teardown.
named_functions.0x00107120: config_lookup_by_name  // linear search of the config table @0x138078 (entries 0x70 bytes) by name; throws std::invalid_argument('invalid device') if not found.
named_functions.0x0010bca0: socketcan_open  // socket(PF_CAN=0x1d, SOCK_RAW=3, CAN_RAW=1); SIOCGIFINDEX(0x8933) on 'vcan0'; bind(sockaddr_can, 0x18=24); spawn socketcan_reader_thread. vtable+0x20 = socketcan_send.
named_functions.0x0010bad0: socketcan_send  // write a struct can_frame {can_id, can_dlc, data[8]} to the CAN socket.
named_functions.0x0010bba0: socketcan_reader_thread  // reads inbound CAN frames from vcan0 and forwards them toward the SPI side.
named_functions.0x00107950: spim_channel_init  // allocate the 0xa8-byte SPI-master channel; copy the bridge config (spidev path + irq pin); spawn spim_reader_thread (SPI<->imx8_bridge). 'Failed to initialize SPIM channel' main.cpp:0x7a.
named_functions.0x00107640: spim_reader_thread  // the SPI processing loop to/from the imx8_bridge (spidev + GPIO data-ready handshake; SPI frame protocol).
named_functions.0x00106840: (static init) builds the config table @0x138078 ('bridge': spidev + irq_pin).

vendor_deferred: the SPI-master frame protocol + the CAN transport-protocol multiframe reassembly (lib/src/tp; 'Multiframe transfer too large (already received: %zu, new DLC: %d, limit: %d)', 'Too many open multiframe write transfers. Will drop an older transfer (src: %d, idx: %d, trgt: %d)'), the GPIO data-ready interrupt (gpio.cpp/gpio_polling.cpp/event_reader.cpp), the std::thread plumbing, the common vm library, libstdc++/libc.
